name: Refrigerator Mocha Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter with eggs and powdered sugar until light and fluffy.
2. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate over hot water.
3. Blend in milk and instant coffee powder until well combined.
4. Fold the melted mixture into the egg mixture.
5. If necessary, chill for a few minutes to firm up before spreading.
6. Line a 9x5 inch loaf pan with plastic wrap.
7. Spread 1/4 inch layer of chocolate mix on the bottom of the pan.
8. Top with a layer of graham crackers and spread another 1/4 inch of chocolate mix.
9. Repeat steps 7-8 five times.
10. Spread remaining chocolate mix over the top and sides.
11. Wrap and chill for at least 2 hours, or until firm.
12. To serve, remove torte from pan and peel off plastic wrap.
13. Smooth surface with a knife dipped in hot water.
14. Place on serving plate; slices are best after sitting at room temperature for 30 minutes.
